news.headline: Big Screen Entertainment Group invests in the $500B beauty industry.
Global construction output projected to rise by 2.3% in 2024 after a year of consolidation and disinflation, following 4.3% growth in 2023.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Construction Market Size, Trends, and Growth Forecasts by Regions and Countries, 2024-2028 (Q4 2024)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report offers a comprehensive analysis of the global construction industry's outlook until 2028. Global construction output is projected to increase by 2.3% in 2024 after a period of consolidation and disinflation. This growth follows a more robust expansion of 4.3% in 2023, which was supported by government stimulus programs.

Morgan Stanley cuts Apple's target price to $252.00 from $275.00. $AAPL
German Saxony State Premier: It is essential that compromise is found so that Germany can function.
National Grid Partners investing $100 million in AI startups for energy innovation. $150 million already invested in 18 companies.
news.summary: A corporate venture leader based in Menlo Park, California has allocated $150 million across 18 AI companies thus far. The entity plans to ramp up investments further to enhance efficiency, diminish emissions, and bolster the energy grid. This venture, known as National Grid Partners, is focused on driving advancements in sustainable technology.

news.headline: Omnicom recognized as a Leader in Forrester's Marketing Creative and Content Services Wave for Q1 2025. #NYC #MarketingLeader
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Omnicom revealed that it has achieved the status of Leader in "The Forrester Wave™: Marketing Creative and Content Services, Q1 2025" report issued by Forrester Research, Inc. The evaluation consisted of 17 criteria, with Omnicom's affiliated networks showcasing their capabilities in various aspects. This recognition signifies Omnicom's strong performance in this sector and underscores its position as a key player in the industry. Additionally, Omnicom is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol OMC.

JPM's Kelly warns Fed faces tough decision.
Canada to put tariffs on US steel and aluminum in new measures.
Putin likely to eventually agree to truce but with own terms.
The Fed are now seen resuming interest-rate cuts in July, vs June earlier, based on short-term interest-rate futures prices.
Canadian swaps market sees roughly 50% chance of another Bank of Canada rate cut in April.
US reserves include approx. 8,133.46 tons of gold ($789.87B), 372M barrels of oil (valued at $28B), and 200K BTC ($15.90B). BTC policy evolving.
news.summary: The US government has historically relied on gold and oil as reserve assets, but with the rise of Bitcoin, its potential role as a strategic reserve has increased. The US holds approximately 8,133.46 metric tons of gold valued at $789.87 billion, 372 million barrels of oil valued at $28 billion, and around 200,000 BTC worth $15.90 billion. Gold is stable and liquid, oil is influenced by geopolitical factors, and Bitcoin is highly volatile. Gold is stored in secure facilities, oil requires expensive infrastructure, and Bitcoin is stored digitally with lower custody fees. Gold hedges against inflation, oil impacts geopolitical stability, and Bitcoin is seen as a decentralized asset. President Trump has initiated plans for a "Strategic Bitcoin Reserve" funded through seized cryptocurrencies, facing mixed reactions and a market decline to $79,515. The US government's Bitcoin policy is set to evolve with recommendations expected by July 2025, aiming to balance innovation with traditional assets like gold and oil in the nation's financial strategy.

news.headline: Prepare plumbing for winter to avoid clogs and costly repairs. Benjamin Franklin Plumbing recommends drain maintenance now.
news.summary: In Columbia, Maryland on March 12, 2025, Benjamin Franklin Plumbing urges homeowners to prioritize plumbing health as temperatures drop. With colder months persisting, now is the time to focus on drain maintenance to avoid winter clogs and expensive repairs. It is crucial to address any plumbing issues promptly to ensure smooth functioning during this period.

news.headline: Rockline Industries showcases progress in sustainability with 2024 report, emphasizing renewable energy and waste reduction.
news.summary: In Sheboygan, Wisconsin, on March 12, 2025, Rockline Industries, a prominent producer of coffee filters and various wet wipes for consumer, medical, and commercial use, published its 14th yearly Sustainability Report. The report showcases significant achievements indicating the company's dedication to sustainability.

news.headline: 215 Green Tech Startups in Austria focused on environmental protection showed a 10% increase from last year.
news.summary: In Graz, Austria as of March 12, 2025, there are 215 emerging technology companies focused on environmental and climate protection, as per the report "Green Tech Startups Austria 2025." This marks a rise of approximately 10% from the prior year. These startups are largely based in university cities.

Infosys partners with Citizens to push AI-led transformation, aiming to drive innovation and market leadership.NYSE: INFYupilInfosys expands collaboration with Citizens to boost AI-led transformation in India. (Count: 100)
news.summary: In an effort to enhance innovation, strengthen market position, and improve customer service, Infosys, a prominent player in next-gen digital services and consulting, revealed plans to expand its operations in BENGALURU, India on March 12, 2025. The company, listed on NSE as INFY, BSE as INFY, and NYSE as INFY, aims to boost its capabilities to better meet the needs of its customers.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: Trade conflict with the US can be expected to increase prices and inflation, weighing on growth.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: Uncertainty weighing on spending tends to put downward pressure on inflation; but rising costs will exert upward pressure.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: We will proceed carefully with any further rate changes given need to assess both upward and downward pressures on inflation.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: We're now facing a new crisis; economic impact of US tariffs could be severe.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: Q2 growth could be hit if household and business intentions remain restrained.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: Surveys suggest that business intentions to raise prices have increased while inflation expectations have moved up.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: Many businesses have scaled back hiring and investment plans; credit has become more difficult to access for some firms.
BoC: The annual inflation rate is expected to increase to about 2.5% in March as the sales tax break ends.
BoC: There are warning signs that heightened trade tensions could disrupt jobs market recovery.
BoC: Short-term inflation expectations have risen in light of fears about the impact of tariffs.
BoC: We will be closely monitoring inflation expectations.
BoC: Economic outlook continues to be subject to more-than-usual uncertainty.
BoC: We will carefully assess timing and strength of both downward and upwards pressures on inflation.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: It will take some time for impacts of higher costs and weaker demand to work their way through the economy.
The New America High Income Fund, Inc. reorg into T. Rowe Price High Yield Fund to close on March 31, 2025, pending approval.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, the New America High Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: HYB) disclosed plans for its reorganization into the T. Rowe Price High Yield Fund. The reorganization, anticipated to be finalized on March 31, 2025, just before the New York Stock Exchange's opening, hinges on meeting standard closing requirements. After completion, the Fund's shareholders will transition to owning Investor Class shares of the T. Rowe Price Fund.

news.headline: Meme coins like Dogecoin, SHIB, and PEPE rise as Trump's meme coin sees modest gains amid stock market decline.
news.summary: Popular joke cryptocurrencies are experiencing a rebound, with significant increases in value, even as the conventional financial market faces a downturn due to President Donald Trump's trade conflict.

news.headline: TotalEnergies report on digital transformation in 2024 includes company tech activities, strategies, innovation programs - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: In Dublin, a new addition to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering is the company profile of TotalEnergies, focusing on its tech activities. The report delves into the company's digital transformation strategies, innovation programs, and technology initiatives. TotalEnergies SE, previously Total SA, is a global energy corporation involved in all aspects of the oil and gas industry, including crude oil exploration and production.

GALE wins Ad Age Business Transformation Agency & Adweek U.S. Media Agency of the Year for 2025, leading in innovative marketing.
news.summary: Stagwell's subsidiary GALE, with the ticker symbol STGW, has been honored for its exceptional performance in driving significant business outcomes for its clientele. The company has been acknowledged for its pioneering strategies in integrated marketing, solidifying its position as an industry leader. Recently, GALE achieved notable success by securing two prestigious awards, including recognition from Ad Age's 2025 ceremony. This accomplishment underscores the firm's commitment to delivering innovative and effective marketing solutions.

news.headline: US inflation eases with CPI increasing by 0.2% in February. #economicnews
CPI inflation cools in February, S&P 500 futures rise amid Trump travel slump, consumer caution.
news.summary: Core inflation in February decreased more than anticipated, reflecting consumer hesitation. This led to a rise in S&P 500 futures. This comes as a response to the Trump travel decline. The latest consumer price index data shows a cooling in core inflation, indicating consumer reluctance towards spending. This news has resulted in an increase in S&P 500 futures.

news.headline: Venezuela business guild calls on US, Venezuela to resume negotiations amid possible negative impact of Chevron license cancellation.
Nebius Academy and Stevens Institute of Technology partner to launch Lab for AI in Mathematics Education in Hoboken, N.J.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Stevens Institute of Technology in Hoboken, N.J. and Nebius Academy, an initiative of AI infrastructure provider Nebius, to establish the Laboratory for AI in Mathematics Education. This collaborative effort aims to explore and enhance the application of AI in math education and research. The lab will focus on leveraging large language models (LLMs) and other AI technologies to advance mathematical reasoning. It will be based at Stevens Institute of Technology in Hoboken, N.J.

news.headline: Wolf Games launched with $4M seed funding from TV and music industry giants like Dick Wolf and Jimmy Iovine.
news.summary: A new startup called Wolf Games, based in Los Angeles, is set to revolutionize the gaming industry with generative cinematic games tailored specifically to individual players. Today marks the official launch of the company, which has secured $4 million in seed funding. This investment comes from notable figures in the television and music industries, such as legendary TV producer Dick Wolf, known for creating long-running drama series like Law & Order and Law & Order: SVU. Additionally, music industry pioneer Jimmy Iovine has also contributed to the funding. Wolf Games aims to bring a fresh and personalized gaming experience to users, thanks to this substantial financial backing.

news.headline: Benuvia Operations receives GMP Certification from Brazil's ANVISA, becoming preferred manufacturing partner in Latin America.
news.summary: A company based in Round Rock, Texas, known as Benuvia Operations, LLC, has been selected as the top manufacturing partner for pharmaceutical companies seeking to enter or grow in the largest healthcare market in Latin America. This decision applies to both Brazilian and international companies. This announcement was made on March 12, 2025, through PRNewswire. Benuvia Operations, LLC is a global organization specializing in contract development, serving as a key ally for businesses looking to make their mark in the Latin American market.
